name: Lotus Resources Limited
content: Lotus Resources Limited is an Australian-based uranium developer and explorer that owns an 85% interest in the Kayelekera Uranium Project in Malawi. The project is a proven uranium operation that successfully produced approximately 11 million pounds of uranium between 2009 and 2014 before being placed on care and maintenance. Lotus is focused on restarting production at Kayelekera to leverage the growing global demand for nuclear energy. Additionally, the company holds the Letlhakane Uranium Project in Botswana, one of the largest undeveloped uranium resources globally, further strengthening its position in the nuclear fuel supply chain.
